meta.title: Larissa Alves | Fullstack Dev
meta.description: Fullstack Dev | Larissa - Fullstack Developer specialized in building modern, responsive web applications. Check out my projects and get in touch.

hero.description: I build modern applications focused on performance and usability, delivering more intuitive and functional experiences.

about.headline: Turning ideas into
about.para1: I'm a full-stack developer at AltoQi, a software company in the construction industry. I work with Node.js, React, and Svelte, bridging backend and frontend to deliver functional, efficient applications.
about.para2: I'm currently studying Computer Science at PUCPR, while also taking on freelance web development projects. My background includes Python automation, Power BI dashboards, and backend work with Java and Spring Boot. Learning and turning ideas into working code is what keeps me going.
about.terminal_output: A developer who loves to build, learn, and ship things that actually make sense.

projects.headline: Recent
projects.description: Projects I've built using different technologies and approaches, each one solving real-world problems in a practical way.
projects.fluxo_caixa: A cash flow management tool built for small businesses and freelancers who need a simple way to track income, expenses, and daily/monthly results.
projects.silva_diesel: Official website for Silva Diesel, featuring a modern, responsive interface that highlights their specialized services and heavy vehicle repairs.
projects.estoque: A full-featured inventory system with product registration, updates, removal, and real-time monitoring.
projects.nlw: Built during Rocketseat's Next Level Week (NLW) event — an interactive rooms app powered by modern tools from the React ecosystem.

contact.headline: Get in
contact.description: Got a project in mind or just want to chat? Feel free to reach out.
contact.available_description: Currently available for freelance work. Let's talk about what you need.

footer.made_with: Made with 💜 and lots of code
